title: Formation Flight early-cycle causal mechanism probe
scientificQuestion: Is the unresolved c16-to-c20 follower-power change generated primarily by near-wing momentum-exchange realization or by transported wake structure?

nearBoundary.selectionRule: maximum absolute near-boundary normalized residual energy

wake.selectionRule: maximum absolute outside-band normalized residual energy

momentumExchangeDecomposition.topologyIdentity: production force equals persistent-link terms plus conservative cover and uncover impulses
momentumExchangeDecomposition.powerIdentity: each component actuator power is minus root-referenced aerodynamic torque dotted with the prescribed angular velocity

decisionRule.normalization: at each resolution, divide production and all five component actuator powers by the matched isolated-follower mean-positive-power scalar in the locked complete report
decisionRule.differenceDefinition: normalized c20 component actuator power minus normalized c16 component actuator power at each grid's nearest representable phase; each actual phase must lie within half a timestep of the locked target
decisionRule.componentAttribution: absolute component power difference divided by the L1 sum of all five absolute component differences
decisionRule.boundaryOperatorDominated: near-boundary probe has a dominant interpolationAuxiliary, movingWall, coverImpulse, or uncoverImpulse component
decisionRule.resolvedPopulationDominated: near-boundary probe has dominant reflectedPopulation contribution
decisionRule.wakeTransportDominated: no near-boundary component is dominant and the wake probe retains at least 0.6 outside-boundary residual energy
decisionRule.mixed: none of the preceding frozen rules applies
decisionRule.nextIfBoundaryOperatorDominated: target the identified boundary subterm before any c24 ladder
decisionRule.nextIfResolvedPopulationDominated: test localized boundary resolution or adaptive refinement before changing force accounting
decisionRule.nextIfWakeTransportDominated: test wake-core transport with a localized refinement or advection discriminator
decisionRule.nextIfMixed: retain both pathways and promote only a localized dual-region refinement

claimBoundary: This probe can localize the numerical mechanism behind the stopped refinement ladder. It cannot authorize a quantitative formation-power benefit or a biological bird claim.
